articles.title: MLA for Old Fort says province should consider buying homes impacted by multiple landslides

articles.title: Roughly half of New Hampshire faces moderate drought conditions
articles.description: A lack of beneficial rainfall in recent weeks has pushed areas in southern New Hampshire from abnormally dry conditions back into moderate drought.

articles.title: Surrey highlights free options for waste disposal to curb illegal dumping

articles.title: 'Caloy' and 'Domeng': PH may see 2 cyclones this May — Pagasa
articles.description: LAPU-LAPU CITY, Cebu — One to two tropical cyclones may enter the Philippine Area of Responsibility (PAR) this May, the state weather bureau said. The Philippine Atmospheric, Geophysical and Astronomical Services Administration (Pagasa) reported that tropical cyclones during this month usually recurve and do not directly affect the local landmass. There are also weather systems that pass through the central parts of the country and recurve before exiting PAR. READ: LIST: Philippine typhoon names for 2026 This is based on data from climatological tropical cyclone tracks, weather specialist Leanne Loreto said during the Friday forecast, May 1. The bureau further [...]... Keep on reading: 'Caloy' and 'Domeng': PH may see 2 cyclones this May — Pagasa

articles.title: May's full 'Flower Moon' will light up the sky on Friday 1 May
articles.description: With spring flowers in full bloom, May's full Flower Moon rises on Friday as Darren Bett explains.

articles.title: Dead gray whale at Moss Beach appears to have been killed by an orca, wildlife experts say
articles.description: Wildlife experts say that an orca may have killed a gray whale that washed up on Moss Beach on Sunday. Scientists are evaluating tissue samples and expect to have more information in the coming weeks.

articles.title: Labor Day: Cebu to see fair weather with isolated rains, thunderstorms
articles.description: LAPU-LAPU CITY, Cebu — Cebuanos can expect generally fair weather with isolated rains or thunderstorms on Friday, May 1. This is according to the the state weather bureau today. The Visayas Pagasa Regional Services Division said the current weather would be caused by prevailing easterlies, which would also bring warm and humid conditions in the country. Cebu will also experience light to moderate winds and slight to moderate seas throughout the day. READ: Heat Index: Why Cebuanos should not take the heat for granted Similar conditions are forecast for the rest of the Visayas, Palawan, including Kalayaan Islands, and Occidental Mindoro. [...]... Keep on reading: Labor Day: Cebu to see fair weather with isolated rains, thunderstorms

articles.title: Rising heat index in parts of Visayas to persist into early May

Based on Pagasa’s latest data as of 5 p.m.

articles.title: Advocates in northwestern Ont., say citizen science can play a key role in managing blue-green algae
articles.description: Groups of dedicated researchers and volunteers in northwestern Ontario have been working to raise awareness about blue-green algae in freshwater systems and the risks that come with it. Now, they’re advocating for their work to be integrated into the reporting and monitoring systems already in place in the province.

articles.title: Queen Camilla buys Thin Mint Girls Scout cookies at Virginia block party
articles.description: When Front Royal Virginia Mayor Lori Cockrell received a voicemail from the British Embassy inquiring about a visit from the King of England to her small town, she assumed it was spam; as it turns out, it was a very real call.

articles.title: Transgender Idahoans sue to block state ban on opposite-sex restroom use
articles.description: A half-dozen transgender Idaho residents sued the state over its newly approved law banning opposite-sex use of public restrooms in government buildings and public accommodations, arguing that the "vague" and "discriminatory" law violates their constitutional rights.

articles.title: After deadly Texas floods, Camp Mystic drops its bid to reopen this summer
articles.description: The camp withdrew its license application after coming under intense pressure from families of children who died as well as state legislators.

articles.title: Inside 'Scientology speedruns,' the viral trend prompting the church to bolster security
articles.description: A growing social media trend has young people "speedrunning" through Church of Scientology buildings on Hollywood Boulevard in Los Angeles, prompting the church to boost security and remove its external door handles.

articles.title: Chadchart tackles arborist shortage, sets citywide tree standards

articles.title: East Troy tree removal professional cleans up tornado damage in hometown cemetery
articles.description: Parts of East Troy are still cleaning up after an EF-1 tornado barrelled down County Road D on April 14. Jim Good is putting his tools and knowledge to work in the recovery effort.

articles.title: Dry weather, high winds leads to Prince George County fire ban
articles.description: Prince George County issued an immediate ban on all outdoor burning while dry, windy conditions persist.
